---
name: PDF Extraction
description: Extracts text and metadata from PDF files with high accuracy
---

# PDF Skill

This skill handles PDF extraction and processing. It includes methods for:

- Text extraction
- Metadata reading
- Image extraction
- Form field detection

## Implementation Details

The PDF extraction process involves multiple steps:

1. Load the PDF file
2. Parse the document structure
3. Extract text content
4. Extract metadata
5. Extract images if present
6. Handle special cases

This is a comprehensive skill for handling PDF files in various formats and encodings.
